inputs.label: Batch Size (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units started in the batch. Based on production planning standards (APICS).

inputs.label: Good Units Output
inputs.businessContext: Units meeting quality specifications. ISO 9001 quality metrics.

inputs.label: Rework Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that can be reworked to meet specs. Lean Six Sigma DMAIC.

inputs.label: Scrap Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that are scrapped. Waste reduction metrics (Lean).

inputs.label: Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Standard cost per unit including materials and labor. Managerial accounting.

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Additional cost to rework a unit. Cost of quality (COQ) analysis.

inputs.label: Selling Price per Unit ($)
inputs.businessContext: Revenue per good unit sold. Pricing strategy.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.yieldRate < 0.9: Low yield warning: yield rate below 90%
thresholds.scrapRate > 0.05: High scrap rate: scrap exceeds 5% of batch
thresholds.reworkRate > 0.1: High rework rate: rework exceeds 10% of batch

suggestedActions: scrapRate > 0.05 ? 'Investigate root cause of scrap and implement process improvements (e.g., Poka-Yoke).' : ''
reworkRate > 0.1 ? 'Analyze rework causes and consider SMED or standardized work.' : ''
yieldRate < 0.9 ? 'Review quality control and consider Six Sigma DMAIC project.' : ''
